race.comment: Gai and Adrian bring CONCHIERO (9) back to NSW after a mixed opening to this campaign in Victoria. Returned in good order two back at Caulfield then tired late in a disappointing effort over this trip at Cranbourne last start. Won his maiden over this course and distance and scored third-up at his only attempt so this looks a nice setup. The lightly raced WITHOUT PEER (10) resumes. Opened the maiden campaign with a win then progressed to fill a placing behind Sixties in the Group 3 Ming Dynasty over this trip. Has the class to test this field. YOSHINOBU (1) didn't have much luck in the straight last start so that failure can be forgiven. Fitter for two runs back and is a likely improver. MISS SPACEGIRL (4) has been going well in better races so must be considered. RUINATION (7) was thoroughly outclassed first-up behind Tempted but can play a key role in this far easier race.
